summary: Completed frontend testing for product translations and mobile layout. Product translations ARE working correctly - product descriptions are translated to the selected language while brand names (iPhone, Samsung Galaxy, etc.) correctly remain unchanged. UI elements, navbar, filters, and dialogs are all properly translated. Mobile layout has no major issues - no large empty spaces detected. Language switching works on both desktop and mobile via hamburger menu.

issues: Page title remains 'BidBlitz - Penny Auktionen' (German) regardless of selected language - should be translated

product_translations.details: Product descriptions ARE being translated correctly. Brand names (Bang & Olufsen, Samsung Galaxy, iPhone, etc.) correctly remain unchanged as they are proper nouns.
examples_translated: Fshesë me korrent premium pa kabëll (Albanian for 'Premium cordless vacuum')
Samsung flamurtari me S Pen (Albanian for 'Samsung flagship with S Pen')
Televizori Premium Sony (Albanian for 'Premium Sony TV')

language_switching.desktop: Language dropdown in navbar works correctly
language_switching.mobile: Hamburger menu opens and shows language options
language_switching.persistence: Language stored in localStorage under 'language' key

mobile_layout.details: No large empty spaces detected. Layout is responsive and properly formatted.

buttons: Hyr për të ofruar (Login to bid)
sections: ANKANDI I DITËS (Auction of the Day)

action_items: MINOR: Consider translating page title based on selected language
MINOR: Some restaurant vouchers have inconsistent translations (mix of German and Albanian)
critical_code_review_comments: Product translation system is well-implemented using name_translations and description_translations fields
Language mapping (xk -> sq for Kosovo) is working correctly
getProductName() utility function properly falls back to German or original name if translation not available

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor cosmetic issues only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Product translations are working correctly. The system translates product descriptions while keeping brand names unchanged (correct behavior). UI translations work for all tested languages. Mobile layout has no major issues. Language switching works via both desktop dropdown and mobile hamburger menu. localStorage key for language is 'language'.
